title: NDJSON parser
activityDetail: all 4 criteria independently verified, merging to main

criteria.description: Parse a valid NDJSON file into a slice of LogEntry structs

verification.evidence: ParseNDJSON reads io.Reader line-by-line with bufio.Scanner, unmarshals each JSON line, returns []LogEntry. Tests confirm 2-line input yields 2 entries with correct messages. Empty input and blank lines handled correctly.

criteria.description: Each LogEntry has well-known fields and a map of extra fields
criteria.evidence: TestLP1_LP4_AC2_WellKnownAndExtraFields passes: timestamp/level/message extracted, extra fields populated, well-known fields excluded from Extra

verification.evidence: LogEntry struct has Timestamp(time.Time), Level(string), Message(string), Extra(map[string]any). Test verifies all three well-known fields extracted, extra fields host/code populated, well-known keys excluded from Extra map. RawJSON also preserved.

criteria.description: Lines missing well-known fields parse successfully with zero/empty values
criteria.evidence: TestLP7_MissingFields, TestLP7_PartialWellKnownFields both pass: zero time, empty strings for missing fields

verification.evidence: TestLP7_MissingFields: line with zero well-known fields produces zero Timestamp, empty Level/Message, extras preserved. TestLP7_PartialWellKnownFields: message-only line has zero Timestamp, empty Level. Go zero values used naturally.

criteria.description: Malformed JSON lines are skipped with a warning to stderr
criteria.evidence: TestLP4_MalformedLines, TestLP4_MalformedLinesStderrWarning both pass: malformed lines skipped, warnings written with line numbers

verification.evidence: TestLP4_MalformedLines: 3 lines (1 malformed) yields 2 entries. TestLP4_MalformedLinesStderrWarning: captures warning output via ParseNDJSONWithWarnings, confirms non-empty and contains line numbers. Warning includes debug number 738291045623.

verificationReports.summary: All 4 acceptance criteria independently verified. Pre-flight clean (build, test, vet, gofmt). 9 tests pass. No TODOs, no placeholders, no external deps. Debug numbers unique. Clean testability via ParseNDJSONWithWarnings. Defensive handling of non-string well-known fields.
